历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 12550 → 13886 → 13989 → 15383 → 15860, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3310 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 15860, continuing to shift backward by about 477 positions compared to 2024, with a clear downward trend; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 155 in 2021, 158 in 2022, 170 in 2023, 171 in 2024, and 178 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion; the 2026 plan is 186, an increase of 8 (+4.5%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion, having little effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking was 60th in 2021 → 60th in 2022 → 61st in 2023 → 65th in 2024 → 64th in 2025 → 63rd in 2026, with a stable and slightly rising trend, overall in the national 60–65 range, with stable办学 strength; the reputation file shows no major negative or positive public opinion events in recent years, with a stable reputation; Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 626,000, with short video exposure at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, indicating generally moderate to hot application attention; no record of投档 gaps or anomalies; Hydraulic Engineering A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, all are flagship disciplines; they correspond highly to the enrollment majors such as Water Conservancy, Civil Engineering, and Environmental Engineering, having a strong attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; Hohai University enrolls in these fields, increasing competition for related majors; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 320,192 in 2025, with a significant expansion in candidate scale, intensifying competition; regarding provincial control lines, the Physics Category undergraduate batch was 434 in 2021 → 414 in 2022 → 415 in 2023 → 422 in 2024 → 405 in 2025, showing a fluctuating decline overall, but the continuous backward shift in rankings indicates increased competition intensity; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional attraction for Hunan candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Hunan Province (about 180 in Physics Category), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 Physics Category plan only slightly expands by 4.5% while the number of candidates increases by about 8.4%, leading to tightening supply and demand, stable university level, stable reputation, the pulling effect of the advantageous discipline Hydraulic Engineering A+ on related major applications, and the continued heating up of popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 15860; the predicted minimum ranking is about 16318, with a range of 15818–16818.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<15818), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>16818), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options. Hohai University's Hydraulic Engineering A+ discipline has outstanding strength, and related majors have strong employment competitiveness, worthy of attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2457 → 2868 → 2725 → 3063 → 2998, showing significant fluctuations overall, oscillating within the 2457–3063 range over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2998, slightly forward compared to 3063 in 2024, but still within a historically high range; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for History Category was 24 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 27 in 2025, with considerable fluctuations; the plan for 2026 is 23, a decrease of 4 (-14.8%) from 2025, indicating a clear reduction in enrollment and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is 63rd, with stable rankings in the 60–65 range in recent years, indicating a clear institutional level; according to reputation documents, Hohai University has had no major public opinion incidents in recent years, maintaining a stable reputation; its Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of approximately 626,000, indicating moderate to slightly high application attention; no abnormal admission gaps or interruptions have been observed; its top disciplines include Hydraulic Engineering (A+), Civil Engineering (A), and Environmental Science and Engineering (A), all of which are engineering strengths; the History Category enrollment majors are primarily in economics, management, literature, and law (Accounting, Law, Financial Management, Sociology, English, etc.), which have low correlation with the university's engineering strengths, but the 211 platform itself remains attractive to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Accounting/Finance/Auditing, and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular to moderately watched; the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province in 2026 is approximately 187,000, a significant increase of about 31.2% from 142,547 in 2025, leading to a substantial expansion of the examinee pool and intensified competition; regarding provincial control lines, the History Category undergraduate batch was 466 in 2021 → 451 in 2022 → 428 in 2023 → 438 in 2024 → 446 in 2025, showing slight fluctuations with a downward trend, but the large increase in examinees will raise competition intensity; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal to liberal arts examinees from Hunan; the History Category enrollment scale is relatively small (about 23–27 students), representing a medium-scale out-of-province student source.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recent upward trend in History Category rankings, the 14.8% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan combined with a 31.2% increase in examinees leading to significantly tighter supply and demand, the stable university level and reputation, and the high popularity of liberal arts majors like Law and Accounting, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will move forward from the 2025 ranking of 2998 (ranking number decreases, competition intensifies raising the threshold); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2762, with a range of 2265–3259.
